sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12910" key="a)pokoptiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπο-κοπτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n12910.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fit for cutting off,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inR.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.182</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">296K.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
